title: EMC+
description: A modpack designed for use on the EarthMC Minecraft server (with preliminary support for other popular earth map servers).
body:
For those of us who play on this server way too much.
Unaffiliated with EarthMC
Read about the EarthMC server!

EMC+ is a client-side ONLY modpack that is designed to enhance the player experience on EarthMC. For the list of mods that are included, see the [Versions Page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/emcplus/version/0.1.2a) # 📥 Installation EMC+ is compatible with all launchers that support .mrpack, though it is only tested with Prism Launcher, and thus its use is recommended. # 🎯 Goals ### 🚀 Stay lightweight & performant This modpack is based on Additive (Adrenaline prior to 1.21.11), a lightweight minimal performance modpack. While EMC+ includes many additional Quality of Life mods, they only serve to provide the minimum viable features to maximize players' enjoyment of the server. Adrenaline provides many benefits, including: - Faster rendering and logic - Reduced and optimized memory usage - More stable framerates ### ⚙️ Source-available All mods in EMC+ are either open-source or source-available, which means you can view the code of mods and see exactly what they are doing. If you would like to view the mods in EMC+, simply look at the dependencies in the Modrinth page. # 💡 Main Features - Excellent performance, thanks to Adrenaline - Bundled EarthPack for custom server textures - Most OptiFine features implemented - Customizable zoom mod! - Dynamic Lighting - Chat tabs configured for EarthMC - Custom main menu featuring community submissions! *Special Credits for MCPBuilderGuy and the team for EarthPack!* *EMC+'s description is heavily inspired by [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline) and [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)'s descriptions and also includes some information from them. Description last updated: March 9, 2026*
